name: CareerPilot
description: An AI-powered career roadmap generator that provides personalized, step-by-step learning paths based on a user's career goals and experience level.
hook: Many aspiring developers struggle to find a clear, structured learning path for their desired career. They waste time jumping between random tutorials without knowing what to learn next or how to build real-world skills.
solution: CareerPilot uses AI (Gemini API) to generate personalized, step-by-step career roadmaps. Users input their target role and experience level, and the app creates a complete learning path with curated resources, milestones, and progress tracking.

techStack.name: Next.js
techStack.purpose: Frontend framework for SSR and routing

techStack.name: MongoDB
techStack.purpose: NoSQL database for storing user data and roadmaps

challenge: Integrating the Gemini API to produce consistent, structured roadmap JSON while handling rate limits and parsing errors. Also, managing complex nested state for multi-step roadmap progress.
impact: Helped users reduce decision fatigue by providing clear, actionable learning paths. The personalized approach increased user engagement and completion rates compared to static resource lists.

name: Digital Life Lessons
description: A platform for creating, storing, and sharing meaningful life lessons and personal growth insights, featuring public/private visibility and a premium subscription model.
hook: People collect wisdom over a lifetime, but there's no dedicated space to document, organize, and share life lessons with others—or keep them private for personal reflection.
solution: A full-stack platform where users can write life lessons, tag them by category, control visibility (public/private), and subscribe to premium features for advanced organization and insights.

techStack.name: React.js
techStack.purpose: Interactive UI for creating and browsing lessons

techStack.name: MongoDB
techStack.purpose: Database for lessons and user data

challenge: Implementing a flexible visibility system where content could be public, private, or unlisted, while ensuring proper authorization checks at every API layer. Also, integrating Stripe subscriptions with role-based access.
impact: Created a niche community for personal growth. Users reported that documenting lessons regularly improved their self-awareness and decision-making over time.

name: TravelEase
description: A full-stack vehicle rental and trip management platform where users can list, book, and manage vehicles with a modern, responsive interface.
hook: Travelers often struggle to find reliable, local vehicle rentals in one place. Existing solutions are either too complex or lack transparency in pricing and availability.
solution: TravelEase connects vehicle owners with travelers through a simple listing and booking system. Owners can list vehicles with pricing, availability, and images; travelers can search, filter, and book in minutes.

techStack.name: Express.js
techStack.purpose: REST API for bookings and listings

techStack.name: MongoDB
techStack.purpose: Database for vehicles, users, and bookings

challenge: Handling concurrent booking requests to prevent double-booking the same vehicle for overlapping dates. Implemented date-range validation and booking status locks to ensure data integrity.
impact: Simplified the vehicle rental process for local tourism. Reduced booking friction and gave small vehicle owners a digital presence to reach more customers.

name: GreenNest
description: A single-page web application built for plant lovers who want to nurture and decorate their homes with beautiful indoor plants.
hook: Indoor plant enthusiasts often struggle to find reliable care information and curated plant collections in one visually appealing place.
solution: GreenNest offers a curated plant catalog with care guides, watering reminders, and a beautiful browsing experience. Users can explore plants by category, light needs, and difficulty level.
challenge: Creating a smooth, app-like experience in a single-page application while keeping bundle size small. Used lazy loading and code splitting for images and heavy components.
impact: Provided plant lovers with an easy-to-use, aesthetically pleasing resource for discovering and caring for indoor plants. Improved user engagement through interactive animations.

name: Hero IO
description: A production-ready, responsive web application that simulates a real-world app store experience. Users can browse applications, view detailed analytics, and manage their installations.
hook: Developers and product managers need a clean way to showcase app portfolios with analytics, but most solutions are either too generic or lack interactive data visualization.
solution: Hero IO simulates a real app store with detailed app pages, installation management, and interactive analytics dashboards using charts and filters.

techStack.name: React 19
techStack.purpose: Latest React features and performance improvements

techStack.name: Vite
techStack.purpose: Fast build tooling and dev server

challenge: Implementing responsive, interactive charts that perform well on mobile devices. Optimized Recharts rendering and used memoization to prevent unnecessary re-renders on data updates.
impact: Delivered a polished, production-ready app store demo that showcases strong frontend skills. The analytics dashboard became a highlight for portfolio reviewers.
